name: @radzor/screenshot
description: Capture full-page and element screenshots using a headless Chromium browser. Supports URL capture, HTML content rendering, and CSS selector targeting. Produces PNG or JPEG buffers.

inputs.name: fullPage
inputs.description: Capture the full scrollable page, not just the viewport.

inputs.name: waitFor
inputs.description: Page load event to wait for before capturing.

outputs.name: screenshotBuffer
outputs.description: Captured screenshot as PNG or JPEG bytes.

events.name: onCaptured
events.description: Fired when a screenshot is captured.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on navigation or capture error.

actions.name: capture

params.name: url
params.description: URL to navigate to and capture.

params.name: options
params.description: Per-call overrides for viewport, fullPage, format.

actions.description: Navigate to a URL and capture a screenshot.

actions.name: captureElement

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector of the element to capture.

actions.description: Capture a specific DOM element by CSS selector.

actions.name: captureHtml

params.name: html
params.description: HTML string to render and capture.

actions.description: Render raw HTML in a headless browser and capture a screenshot.

llm.constraints: Requires Puppeteer and a Chromium installation. In Docker, use a puppeteer image or install chromium separately. Not compatible with edge runtimes or serverless functions with small memory limits (min 512MB recommended). Reuse browser instances across captures for performance.
